result.anchor_clause: Section 3.6 (Limitation on Liens); [INTENTIONALLY DELETED] — together with the deletion of Section 3.2 (Limitation on Indebtedness), Section 3.3 (Limitation on Restricted Payments), Section 3.20 (Designation of Restricted and Unrestricted Subsidiaries) and Article X (Guarantee) "in their entirety, ... and these Sections and clauses shall be of no further force and effect, and the words '[INTENTIONALLY DELETED]' shall be inserted."
result.trustee: The Bank of New York Mellon, as trustee
result.guarantors: The Guarantors (as defined in the Indenture) — however, Article X (Guarantee) is deleted in its entirety and the supplemental indenture provides for termination/release of Note Guarantees; prior Guarantors added by supplements included Altuglas LLC, Trinseo Services Ireland Limited, Aristech Surfaces LLC, Trinseo Ireland Global IHB Limited and Heathland B.V.
result.unrestricted_subsidiary_designation_flex: Section 3.20 (Designation of Restricted and Unrestricted Subsidiaries) has been deleted in its entirety and is of no further force and effect; the indenture no longer governs designation of unrestricted subsidiaries.

lme_vectors.rationale: The lien covenant (Section 3.6) and merger/sacred-right protections have been stripped, leaving no contractual limitation on incurring priming or secured debt.
lme_vectors.basis: Section 3.6 (Limitation on Liens) and clauses of Section 4.1 (Merger and Consolidation) deleted in their entirety and of no further force and effect.
lme_vectors.quote: Section 3.6 (Limitation on Liens); ... shall be of no further force and effect, and the words “[INTENTIONALLY DELETED]” shall be inserted

lme_vectors.rationale: Deletion of the unrestricted-subsidiary designation covenant and asset-sale/investment limitations removes any restriction on transferring assets or IP to non-guarantor or unrestricted subsidiaries.
lme_vectors.basis: Section 3.20 (Designation of Restricted and Unrestricted Subsidiaries) and Section 3.5 (Limitation on Sales of Assets and Subsidiary Stock) deleted in their entirety.
lme_vectors.quote: Section 3.20 (Designation of Restricted and Unrestricted Subsidiaries); ... shall be of no further force and effect

lme_vectors.rationale: The limitation on indebtedness has been deleted entirely, so the indenture imposes no cap or ratio on incurring additional debt.
lme_vectors.basis: Section 3.2 (Limitation on Indebtedness) deleted in its entirety and of no further force and effect.
lme_vectors.quote: Section 3.2 (Limitation on Indebtedness); ... shall be of no further force and effect

lme_vectors.rationale: The restricted payments covenant and the restriction on distributions from restricted subsidiaries have both been deleted, leaving no limitation on value leakage.
lme_vectors.basis: Section 3.3 (Limitation on Restricted Payments) and Section 3.4 (Limitation on Restrictions on Distributions from Restricted Subsidiaries) deleted in their entirety.
lme_vectors.quote: Section 3.3 (Limitation on Restricted Payments); ... shall be of no further force and effect
